The '''Magnaforce security shield''' manufactured by [[Simcronics]] was a defensive [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] system worn on the wrist. When activated, it would produce a small defensive field that was capable of resisting medium-power [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolts.<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

{{Tech-stub}}
